description.ko: 정밀함과 왜곡의 융합을 경험하십시오. 쿠로-X 기하학적 글리치는 파편화된 형상과 네온 조명의 벡터 경로를 통해 디지털 불안정성의 미학을 담아내며, 질서와 혼돈의 경계를 재정의합니다.
description.en: Experience the fusion of precision and distortion. KURO-X Geometric Glitch captures the beauty of digital instability through fragmented shapes and neon-lit vector paths, redefining the boundary between order and chaos.

prompt: Futuristic KURO-X visual, geometric glitch art style, sharp polygonal shards, digital artifacts, chromatic aberration, neon electric blue and deep void black, high-speed motion blur, 8k resolution, cinematic lighting, techwear aesthetic, fragmented vector shapes, cybernetic textures.
